value_metric: media can surface a lead but never impersonate official: a lead resolves back to the issuing authority's original (by cited 发文字号 or referenced title) or ABSTAINS as UNKNOWN, and reposts of one event merge into a single canonical event -- so the system credits the official original, not the media rewrite

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: resolver + grouping; not wired to the worker; the 50-lead sample uses real board3 news items + synthetic official index
